${modID}:RelicID.NAME: Good Relic
${modID}:RelicID.FLAVOR: Flavor text displayed in detailed relic view.
DESCRIPTIONS: Gain [E] at the start of your turn. [E] is an energy icon.

${modID}:SukunaFinger.NAME: Sukuna's Finger
${modID}:SukunaFinger.FLAVOR: A mummified finger belonging to the King of Curses. It pulses with a malevolent energy.
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of each combat, gain #b1 #yStrength. Whenever you play an #yAttack, there is a #b10% chance to add a copy of it to your hand. The copy costs #b0 and has #yExhaust.
